_comment: BUG FIX #12: The original value was the literal string 'REPLACE_WITH_BACKEND_URL'. When Program.cs calls new Uri(apiBase) on startup, an invalid URI throws UriFormatException and crashes the entire WASM app before it can render anything. Changed to an empty string so the fallback (builder.HostEnvironment.BaseAddress) is used in production builds where this file is not environment-substituted. Set ApiBaseUrl to your actual backend URL before deploying — e.g. https://api.yourdomain.com
